history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I need to turn to face a safe path; the cell below me at row 03 column B is floor, so turning right will make me face down toward a safe move.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly below me at row 03 column B is safe (`.`), while moving right would lead toward lava at row 02 column C. The safest next step is to move forward down the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cells directly below me are safe at row 04 column B and row 05 column B, but row 06 column B is also safe and seems like the start of the open path toward the goal at row 08 column H. Since I am already facing downward, moving forward is the safest next step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is safe (`.`), while the goal is farther below and to the right. Moving forward is the safest progress toward the open area and goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B, facing down. The cell directly below me at row 06 column B is safe (`.`), while the goal is farther down and to the right. The immediate safe move is to go forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down, but the cell directly ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so I cannot move forward. The safe path toward the goal at row 08 column H is to turn right and head east through the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B, facing left (`<`). The cell to my left is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. To head toward the goal at row 08 column H, I need to turn to face right and then move into the safe open path.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B, facing up (`^`). The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is safe (`.`), while the goal is farther away. Moving forward is the best next step to progress through the safe path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B and I am facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 08 column H, so I need to move downward and then right. Since I am currently facing up, the safest first step is to turn right so I can face toward the open path to the east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B, facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 05 column C is lava, so I cannot move forward. To continue safely toward the goal at row 08 column H, I should first turn to face down into the open cell below me at row 06 column B.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column B is safe, while turning would not be necessary yet. Moving forward brings me closer to the open area and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal at row 08 column H, I should turn right to face the open path along row 06.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B, facing left (`<`). The cell directly ahead is a wall at the map boundary, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to the right at row 08 column H, and the safest immediate move is to turn around toward the open path on my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing up (`^`). The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safest progress is to turn right so I can head toward the open path on row 06.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B and facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is at row 08 column H. The safest immediate move is to go forward into the open cell at row 06 column C, since moving downward is blocked by lava/walls and I should progress along the clear corridor to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would take me to row 06 column D, which is safe. That seems to be the best next step toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The path to the right on row 06 is open, so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column E, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would go to row 06 column F, which is safe. This keeps me progressing toward the goal, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06, column F, facing right. The goal is at row 08, column H. Moving forward would take me to row 06, column G, which is safe and moves me closer to the goal, so I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column F facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would go to row 06 column G, which is safe and leads toward the goal, so I should advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H and I am facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me, column I, is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal at row 08 column H, I need to face down. From facing right, turning clockwise will orient me downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 07 column H is lava, so I must not move forward. To head toward the goal at row 08 column H, I need to turn around/adjust my facing direction first. The safest immediate step is to turn left from down to face right, which prepares me to navigate around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H facing right. The goal is at row 08 column H, so I need to move downward, not forward. To face down from right, I should turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H and facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 07 column H is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. To continue safely toward the goal at row 08 column H (which is the goal `G`), I need to turn so I can approach it from the left or right without stepping on lava. The safe next step is to turn left to face right? Actually from down, turning left makes me face right (`>`), which allows me to move toward column I, but row 06 column I is a wall, so that won't help. Turning right from down makes me face left (`<`), and row 06 column G is safe, leading toward the goal. So the best next action is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H, facing left. The goal is at row 08 column H. Moving forward would go to row 06 column G, which is safe, and it progresses me toward the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
